steps.t: Halbarad wants you to talk to the residents of Galtrev in order to learn of the situation in Pren Gwydh.
Catrin is in the village of Galtrev. You have been told to speak with Catrin.
Catrin has directed you to speak with Dai, Hulun, or Idwal in Galtrev.
Catrin is in Galtrev. You should speak with Catrin again.
